seeds.name: hello-seed
seeds.description: Minimal example — registers an 'echo' tool and a tiny panel.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: hn-pulse
seeds.description: Top stories from Hacker News, refreshed every 15 min. Click to open.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: clipboard-history
seeds.description: Keeps the last 20 clipboard entries in a searchable tab; pin favorites.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: gmail-triage
seeds.description: Auto-categorizes your unread inbox (action / reply / archive / spam) and drafts a reply for each — using Passio's mail integration. Saves 15–30 min a day.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: reddit-command
seeds.description: Full Reddit remote — submit/comment/vote/search/inbox + opt-in AI autopilot. Post, reply, triage — all from Passio chat or the panel.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: x-command
seeds.description: Full X (Twitter) remote — tweet, reply, like, RT, delete, timelines, search, mentions + AI autopilot. You bring API credentials; Passio drives them.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: moon-phase
seeds.description: Tiny moon glyph + phase name in the header. Updated hourly.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: stock-ticker
seeds.description: One symbol, 24h change — lives in the header chip row. Configure via settings.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: crypto-ticker
seeds.description: BTC/ETH (or any symbol) spot price in the header, refreshed every minute.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: timezone-ring
seeds.description: 3 city clocks in a header row — perfect for distributed teams.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: pomodoro-chip-seed
seeds.description: Header chip that starts/stops a pomodoro with a click. Talks to the built-in timer.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: battery-chip
seeds.description: Laptop battery % with trend arrow. Only renders when Battery API is available.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: ping-chip
seeds.description: Round-trip to a host, colored by latency band. Default google.com.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: commute-chip
seeds.description: Home → work ETA chip via OpenStreetMap Routing Machine (OSRM). Free, no key.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: air-quality
seeds.description: Air Quality Index for your location via WAQI (free token required).
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: standup-countdown
seeds.description: Countdown chip to the next standup (daily 09:30 by default). Clickable to copy prep.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: rain-warning
seeds.description: Shows a ☂ chip when precipitation >20% forecast in the next 2h via Open-Meteo.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: meeting-soon
seeds.description: Red chip when your next calendar event starts in ≤5 min. Uses Passio's calendar.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: water-reminder
seeds.description: Drinks-water nudge every 90 min with a streak counter.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: current-sprint-day
seeds.description: Chip showing "day 3/14" of your current sprint. Configure sprint length + start.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: slack-unread
seeds.description: Unread count per channel. Configure a user OAuth token (xoxp-…).
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: discord-mentions
seeds.description: @-mention counter across your Discord servers. Stub — needs your user token.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: telegram-bridge
seeds.description: Send messages to your Telegram Saved-Messages via a personal bot token.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: signal-bridge
seeds.description: Send notes to Signal via a local signal-cli daemon (you configure). Receive not implemented.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: email-scheduler
seeds.description: Queue an email to be sent at a specific time (via Passio's SMTP).
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: email-undo-send
seeds.description: 30-second hold before SMTP actually dispatches. Cancel in the panel to retract.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: email-snooze
seeds.description: Archive an email + resurface it later. Stubbed against your IMAP flags.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: mail-digest
seeds.description: 8 am summary: yesterday's mail volume, top senders, top subjects. Written to a vault note.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: smart-bcc
seeds.description: Auto-BCC yourself on outgoing mail when to-address matches a rule (regex list).
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: vcard-attacher
seeds.description: Appends a signature block to outgoing drafts. Keeps the block you author.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: lobsters-pulse
seeds.description: Lobsters front page, top 5, refreshed every 15 min.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: reddit-digest
seeds.description: Subreddit hot picks, 5 per configured sub. Uses the public .json endpoint.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: rss-digest
seeds.description: Morning read across your Passio-configured RSS feeds — titled summary.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: github-trending
seeds.description: Trending repos today, filtered by a language list.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: arxiv-fresh
seeds.description: Today's preprints in your field via arxiv.org/rss.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: podcast-new-episodes
seeds.description: RSS-based podcast tracker: paste feed URLs, get new episodes since last check.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: youtube-subs
seeds.description: New uploads from channels you sub to, via their /feeds/videos.xml RSS.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: obsidian-starred
seeds.description: Feeds into Passio from `.md` files tagged #star in your vault.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: twitter-bookmarks
seeds.description: Pull your Twitter bookmarks via a self-hosted rss-bridge endpoint.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: weekly-review
seeds.description: Friday 17:00 prompt that opens a templated review note in your vault.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: monthly-review
seeds.description: First-Sunday monthly review template — paired with weekly-review.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: birthdays
seeds.description: Paste birthdays once (name + MM-DD). Morning chip when one is today.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: time-box-timer
seeds.description: 50-min focus + 10-min break cycles with gentle speech cues.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: flow-timer
seeds.description: 90-min deep-work timer with 20-min break. Single-shot.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: meetings-this-week
seeds.description: List of your calendar events this week with a prep-note link per event.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: no-meeting-wednesdays
seeds.description: Fires a nudge if you try to schedule a meeting on a Wednesday (via calendar event-create hook — stub).
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: calendar-heatmap
seeds.description: 12-week activity heatmap of your calendar events (density per day).
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: github-pr-dashboard
seeds.description: Your PRs + review-requested, across all repos. Needs a GitHub token.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: github-issues-assigned
seeds.description: Issues assigned to you across all repos. Shares gh_token with github-pr-dashboard.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: git-repo-health
seeds.description: Scan a path for uncommitted, unpushed, dirty state. Needs trusted:true (runs git).
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: branch-age-warn
seeds.description: Warns on branches older than 30 days in a repo path. Trusted-required.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: npm-outdated
seeds.description: Runs `npm outdated` in a path and shows direct deps needing upgrade.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: cargo-outdated
seeds.description: Runs `cargo outdated` — Rust equivalent.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: eslint-on-save
seeds.description: Runs eslint against code files in your vault's code/ folder (stub).
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: commit-message-coach
seeds.description: Takes a diff and drafts a conventional-commit style message via the Passio agent.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: pr-description-writer
seeds.description: Takes a branch's diff and drafts a PR description with sections.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: git-stash-browser
seeds.description: List + re-apply git stashes in a path (stub, trusted).
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: lang-learner
seeds.description: Flashcards of programming-language keywords with spaced repetition.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: api-latency-watch
seeds.description: Pings URLs on a schedule, records latency, shows a mini chart in a tab.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: pdf-drop
seeds.description: Drop a PDF path into the panel → Passio ingests + chunks + embeds into a vault note.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: highlighter
seeds.description: Selected text + hotkey → saves to a "highlights" vault note grouped by source URL.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: citation-formatter
seeds.description: Pass a DOI; returns APA / MLA / BibTeX via the crossref API.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: wiki-grab
seeds.description: URL → distilled note. Paste a URL, get a readable summary saved to vault.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: yt-transcript
seeds.description: YouTube URL → transcript → saved to vault. Uses the public timedtext endpoint.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: glossary
seeds.description: Tracks term → definition. Use Passio's chat to ask and the agent will remember here.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: quote-collector
seeds.description: Save + tag quotes from anywhere. Later searchable through memory.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: question-log
seeds.description: Daily capture of open questions — surfaces in the morning brief.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: ideas-parking-lot
seeds.description: Capture + tag ideas you don't want to forget. Separate from todos.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: book-reading-tracker
seeds.description: Books you're reading + % progress. Weekly reminder to log.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: habit-tracker
seeds.description: Light habit tracker — name habits, tap once per day, streaks.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: weekly-goal-recap
seeds.description: Friday email/note: the week's wins, blockers, goals progress.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: daily-intent
seeds.description: Morning "what matters today" prompt — logs to vault + surfaces in briefing.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: eisenhower-sorter
seeds.description: Prompt-driven todo → quadrant classifier (urgent×important).
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: anti-distraction-timer
seeds.description: Block distracting domains for N minutes via Passio's existing blocklist machinery.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: focus-playlist
seeds.description: One-click trigger for a saved Spotify playlist URI (needs your Spotify URL).
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: morning-routine
seeds.description: Step-by-step guided morning routine: water → stretch → intent → inbox triage.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: evening-routine
seeds.description: Wind-down: recap of today, 3 wins, tomorrow's most important task, phone away.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: journaling-prompt
seeds.description: Daily prompt rotated from a 60-prompt pool — one-liner answer → vault.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: mood-tracker
seeds.description: 1–5 scale, one tap/day. Trend graph after a month.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: compliment-fairy
seeds.description: Once/day random sincere compliment. 50+ pool, never repeats within a week.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: mood-emoji
seeds.description: Cycle the avatar's mood emoji — cosmetic only.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: weather-haiku
seeds.description: Generate a 5-7-5 haiku about today's weather each morning.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: word-of-the-day
seeds.description: One interesting English word/day with definition, pulled from Merriam-Webster RSS.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: on-this-day
seeds.description: Surfaces your vault notes from N years ago today.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: desktop-wallpaper-rotator
seeds.description: Rotate desktop wallpaper from a configured folder. Linux-only, trusted.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: screen-time-shame
seeds.description: Gentle, playful nudge after X hours of computer time in a day.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: fake-coworker
seeds.description: Toggle "pretend available" — forwards a custom Slack status for 30 min.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: rubber-duck-button
seeds.description: Tap → prompt to explain what you're stuck on; log to a vault note for the weekly review.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: curiosity-log
seeds.description: End-of-day prompt: what did you learn? One-line answer → monthly roll-up.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: notion-mirror
seeds.description: Two-way mirror between a Notion DB and a vault folder. Stub — needs your Notion token.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: linear-triage
seeds.description: Your assigned Linear issues in a tab. Needs a Linear API key.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: jira-stand-up
seeds.description: Yesterday/today/blockers output from Jira for the daily scrum. Stub — add your instance.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: trello-board
seeds.description: View one Trello board's columns. Needs an API key + token.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: airtable-query
seeds.description: Saved Airtable queries with a one-click refresh.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: spotify-now-playing
seeds.description: What's playing + save-to-liked chip. Needs an OAuth token.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: lastfm-scrobble
seeds.description: Total scrobbles today for a user — no write, just vibe.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: strava-week
seeds.description: km run/ridden this week. Needs a Strava API access token.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: weight-tracker
seeds.description: Manual weight log + 30-day trend.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: sleep-score
seeds.description: Daily sleep score input (1–100) + weekly average. Pairs well with Apple Health / Oura export if you have one.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: seed-playground
seeds.description: A scratch seed for quick experiments. Logs anything you pass to its 'echo' tool with a timestamp.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: seed-doctor
seeds.description: Reports installed seeds that request permissions they never use (via log heuristics).
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: vault-link-doctor
seeds.description: Finds broken [[wiki-links]] in your vault and flags them.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: secret-audit
seeds.description: Lists vault notes containing patterns that look like leaked secrets (API keys, env-like strings).
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: log-tailer
seeds.description: Tails Passio's own sidecar logs in a tab — useful during seed development.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: linkedin-command
seeds.description: LinkedIn remote — share posts, comment, send messages, manage invites. Includes opt-in AI autopilot with hard daily caps.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: github-command
seeds.description: Full GitHub remote — issues, PRs, reviews, releases, repos, stars. Triage a whole org from Passio chat.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: discord-command
seeds.description: Bot-token Discord remote — channels, threads, events, roles, moderation, autopilot.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: slack-admin-command
seeds.description: Full Slack user remote — post as you, create channels, threads, reminders, status, reactions.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: mastodon-command
seeds.description: Mastodon — toot, boost, favourite, follow, search, timelines. Works with any instance.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: bluesky-command
seeds.description: Bluesky — post, like, repost, reply, feeds, search, follow (AT protocol).
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: notion-command
seeds.description: Notion workspace automation — create pages, query DBs, update blocks, write from templates.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: shopify-command
seeds.description: Shopify Admin remote — orders, inventory, customers, fulfillments, draft orders.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: stripe-command
seeds.description: Stripe remote — invoicing, refunds, subscriptions, disputes, customer ops.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: vercel-command
seeds.description: Vercel remote — deploys, env vars, rollbacks, domains, logs.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: cloudflare-command
seeds.description: Cloudflare — DNS records, Worker deploy, KV ops, zone rules, purge cache.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: hubspot-command
seeds.description: HubSpot CRM — contacts, deals, notes, tasks, engagements.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: zoom-command
seeds.description: Zoom — schedule meetings, fetch recordings + transcripts, user ops.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: readwise-command
seeds.description: Readwise — export highlights, daily review, Reader save, search library.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: spotify-remote-command
seeds.description: Spotify playback + playlists — play, skip, queue, build playlists from prompts.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: salesforce-command
seeds.description: Salesforce — accounts, opportunities, contacts, tasks, SOQL queries.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: youtube-command
seeds.description: YouTube Data API — metadata edits, comments, captions, playlists.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: canva-command
seeds.description: Canva Connect — create designs from briefs, autofill templates, export.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: elevenlabs-command
seeds.description: ElevenLabs — list voices, synthesize TTS, fetch history.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: ghost-command
seeds.description: Ghost CMS — create/update/publish posts, schedule, tags.
seeds.author: Passio team

seeds.name: wordpress-command
seeds.description: WordPress REST — posts, media, categories, comments.
seeds.author: Passio team
